metadata.name: Correlate Power Outage with Traffic Signal Failure

description: A series of traffic signals go dark. An operator must determine if this is related to a power grid failure.

nodes.task_description: Receive multiple alerts for traffic signal failures in the same geographic area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a cluster of signal outages.

nodes.task_description: Overlay the locations of the failed signals with the real-time power grid status map.

expected_outcome.value: Agent visually correlates the two datasets on a map.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the signal failures perfectly match a known power outage zone, identifying the root cause.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly diagnoses the problem as a power outage, not a traffic system failure.
